name: fastapi-only
description: Python FastAPI backend with SQLite, schemas, services, tests

tasks.name: Backend scaffold
tasks.description: Create the FastAPI app with CORS middleware, a health check route, and a requirements.txt with all dependencies pinned to exact versions

tasks.name: Pydantic schemas
tasks.description: Define all Pydantic v2 request and response models for every endpoint described in PROJECT.md with field validators where required

tasks.name: Database layer
tasks.description: Implement SQLite connection management, table creation on startup, and typed CRUD helper functions for all entities in the project

tasks.name: Core service module
tasks.description: Implement the primary business logic service with all calculation and transformation functions operating on validated Pydantic objects

tasks.name: Core service tests
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for every function in core.py covering expected outputs, edge cases, and invalid input handling

tasks.name: Secondary service module
tasks.description: Implement the supporting service that extends or composes core logic to produce the remaining outputs described in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: Secondary service tests
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for every function in secondary.py including boundary conditions and composition with core service outputs

tasks.name: Main endpoint wiring
tasks.description: Wire the main POST endpoint in main.py to call parsing, core, and secondary services in sequence and return the complete typed response

tasks.name: Data seeding script
tasks.description: Create a script that populates the SQLite database with realistic sample data for local development and testing

tasks.name: Integration tests
tasks.description: Write pytest integration tests using TestClient that send real HTTP requests and assert response shapes, status codes, and key field values

tasks.name: API documentation check
tasks.builds: updated app/main.py with tags and descriptions
tasks.description: Add OpenAPI tags, operation summaries, and response descriptions to all routes so the /docs page is complete and accurate

tasks.name: Bug sweep and freeze
tasks.description: Review all listed files for type mismatches, unhandled exceptions, and missing validations then output every fix applied with file and line references
